title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Queen, Hyogoro as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who gave you the tickets?! Tell me! Who did it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will never tell you, even if it kills me!...you little punk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He sticks to his morals, saves the weak, and stands up to the idiots in power! After seeing his heroin,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've got to follow suit, or else I'd do him shame!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: meeting him welled up all sorts of old feelings in me from back when I was young!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Myougorou of the flowers," for the first time in a long time, has had both his heart and stomach satisfied.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the land of the Samura!! Back in the day, men like him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were commonplace!! But you all killed them all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Couldn't win against you idiots in power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Stop!! If you hit a jailer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You'll be sentenced to death!!! Luffytarou!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doesn't it sound a bit noisy inside to you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Top performer, the great queen, has arrived!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 32 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
